description: You are a Junior Quantity Surveyor preparing an IFC model for 5D cost estimation. Using the measurement brief at /home/ga/Desktop/qto_measurement_brief.txt, add the standardized IFC base quantity sets (Qto_WallBaseQuantities, Qto_DoorBaseQuantities, Qto_WindowBaseQuantities, and Qto_SlabBaseQuantities) to the walls, doors, windows, and slabs of the pre-loaded FZK-Haus model. Include reasonable non-zero values for quantities such as Length, Height, GrossSideArea, and GrossVolume. Save the enriched model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_qto_enriched.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: anti_pattern_max_partial=41 (walls_partial=5, doors_partial=8, windows_partial=8, nz_partial=5, new_file=15), threshold=65 safely above
